items.title: Read current validation architecture notes, runtime docs, and validator/skill/taxonomy code
items.notes: Confirmed the main problem is hard-coded narrowing in validator, blocker taxonomy, and skill_pack rather than a pure lack of judge power.

items.title: Scan external CadQuery repositories as candidate corpus/stress-set sources
items.notes: Reviewed cadquery-contrib, cadquery-models, and cq-gridfinity READMEs and mapped their likely value to sweep/loft/selectors, parametric parts, and product-like shells/options.

items.title: Write formal design spec for validation generalization refactor
items.notes: Spec saved under docs/superpowers/specs with architecture, scope, benchmark role changes, corpus strategy, and run archival policy.

items.title: Create dedicated work log for the validation generalization refactor
items.notes: Created a date-scoped work log summarizing the direction change and current boundaries.

items.title: Create dedicated checklist JSON for phase-1 tracking
items.notes: Initialized this checklist to track design, planning, implementation, and verification.

items.title: Wait for user review and approval of the design spec
items.notes: User approved the written design spec and authorized implementation planning.

items.title: Write implementation plan for phase-1 evidence/interpretation refactor
Introduce evidence_bundle and interpretation layers inside validate_requirement while keeping the external contract stable
Demote blocker_taxonomy from repair-lane binding to observation tags and decision hints
Refactor skill_pack from family guidance toward evidence-gap strategy guidance
Add benchmark diagnostics for premature narrowing, insufficient evidence, and repeated same-signal retries
Create the initial external corpus index and curated stress set
Archive runs older than 2026-04-06 and noncanonical run directory names without breaking historical references
Update CODEX and canonical CAD iteration docs to match the new evidence-first direction
Run focused unit tests, at least one real probe, and benchmark/external-sample validation evidence
